falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug assumed a higher low structure; a break below 4,800 would violate the August 2024 bottom's key support level and invalidate the bottoming pattern thesis

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 25 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained VIX spike above 25 contradicts the HOLD signal's implied expectation of volatility compression; it would indicate panic selling rather than consolidation, proving the blowoff score of 41 understated market stress

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further below -50 basis points (currently ~-15bps)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion would signal accelerating recession risk that the pattern match failed to capture; the August 2024 bottom occurred during curve steepening, so renewed inversion invalidates the macro similarity

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
